summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is not a dedupe cluster. Open PRs are kept in their normal review lanes unless a scoped related/security classification is clear. Already-closed primary refs are skipped with keep_closed. Security-sensitive PRs #90216 and #90960 are quarantined with route_security without affecting unrelated non-security PRs.

actions.reason: Open, substantive contributor PR with proof and review context; no duplicate/superseded/low-signal basis in this inventory shard.
Small focused UI PR with unique evidence; failing proof/review gates block merge but do not justify closure.
The PR is not low-signal, but unresolved review-bot findings and failing proof keep it in review rather than closure or merge.
Primary listed PR is closed in live preflight state, so no closure action is valid.
Related to another hydrated Google schema-hardening PR, but active maintainer ownership and unresolved review context make closure unsafe.
Focused maintainer PR in a distinct plugin descriptor-cache surface; not a duplicate or closure candidate.
